queries.question: For each UX designer, show me the component descriptions.
queries.sql: select ux_designers.name , components.description from Ux_Designers_Components join Components on Ux_Designers_Components.component_id = Components.id join Ux_Designers on Ux_Designers_Components.ux_designer_id = Ux_Designers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?ux_designers_components a :Ux_Designers_Components .
  ?components a :Components .
  ?ux_designers_components p:hasComponents ?components .
  ?ux_designers a :Ux_Designers .
  ?ux_designers_components p:hasUx_Designers ?ux_designers .
  ?ux_designers p:name ?name .
  ?components p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Which components are the same for all UX designers?
queries.sql: SELECT Components.component_name  from Ux_Designers_Components join Components on Ux_Designers_Components.component_id = Components.id join Ux_Designers on Ux_Designers_Components.ux_designer_id = Ux_Designers.id   GROUP BY Ux_Designers_Components.component_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Ux_Designers_Components.ux_designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Ux_Designers)

queries.question: Give me the names and descriptions of the components every UX designer uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Components.component_name, Components.description  from Ux_Designers_Components join Components on Ux_Designers_Components.component_id = Components.id join Ux_Designers on Ux_Designers_Components.ux_designer_id = Ux_Designers.id   GROUP BY Ux_Designers_Components.component_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Ux_Designers_Components.ux_designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Ux_Designers)

queries.question: Give me the names and descriptions of the components every UX designer uses.
queries.sql: select ux_designers.name , components.component_name , components.description from Ux_Designers_Components join Components on Ux_Designers_Components.component_id = Components.id join Ux_Designers on Ux_Designers_Components.ux_designer_id = Ux_Designers.id

  ?ux_designers_components p:hasUx_Designers ?ux_designers .

queries.question: For every UX designer, show the components that they design.
queries.sql: select ux_designers.name , components.component_name from Ux_Designers_Components join Components on Ux_Designers_Components.component_id = Components.id join Ux_Designers on Ux_Designers_Components.ux_designer_id = Ux_Designers.id

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?components a :Components .

  ?ux_designers a :Ux_Designers .

queries.question: What is the component description that all UX designers have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Components.description  from Ux_Designers_Components join Components on Ux_Designers_Components.component_id = Components.id join Ux_Designers on Ux_Designers_Components.ux_designer_id = Ux_Designers.id   GROUP BY Ux_Designers_Components.component_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Ux_Designers_Components.ux_designer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Ux_Designers)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the descriptions of the components corresponding to each UX designer.
Give me the components that every UX designer designs.
Give me the names and descriptions of the components every UX designer uses.
